emails.subject: enovate appointments
emails.body: enovate appointments It looks like your memory serves you well. Section 6.8.2 allows the Managing Member to designate officers of enovate. I revised the original appointment declaration you prepared to reflect Laura as VP. Take a look at it and let me know if it works. If so, I will probably ask you to have Janet execute it at your convenience. Thanks Gregg

emails.subject: Re: enovate appointments
emails.body: Re: enovate appointments Sorry about this. I forgot! I'll give it a look. From: Gregg Penman on 01/26/2001 01:16 PM

emails.subject: Re: enovate appointments
emails.body: This looks good to me. We'll track down Janet if that is ok with you. Kay Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 02/13/2001 10:36 AM From: Kathleen Carnahan 02/12/2001 01:26 PM

emails.subject: Re: enovate appointments
emails.body: Looks good to me also. Just let me know when it is executed. I would like to give Bill Morrow a copy when I meet with him tomorrow morning if possible. Thanks Gregg Kay Mann 02/13/2001 10:37 AM
